Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: The Flight Deck menu shows all available aircraft on your carrier. In almost all cases, the first aircraft that should be launched is an Airborne Early Warning (AEW) aircraft. These aircraft are called AWACS (Airborne Warning And Control System) in US parlance. Change the aircraft type to
AEW aircraft are equipped with a very powerful long-range air and surface search radar and function as an aerial command post and reconnaissance platform.
Leave the loadout as 'Early Warning', and then hit
to get one AEW aircraft airborne.
